metadata.description: TechTown Claude Code Plugin Marketplace — plugins for brand guidelines, GCP/Firebase deployments, project setup, reporting, and security guardrails.

plugins.name: brand-guidelines
plugins.description: TechTown brand and design system guidelines. Use when creating UI components, styling pages, Astro/Vue components, Slidev theming, or implementing visual design for TechTown projects.

plugins.name: firebase-deploy
plugins.description: Setup Firebase Hosting with WIF-based GitHub Actions CI/CD for TechTown projects. Use when deploying a web app to Firebase, setting up hosting CI/CD, or configuring GitHub Actions with Workload Identity Federation.

plugins.name: gcp-terraform
plugins.description: TechTown Terraform conventions for GCP: Cloud Run, Cloud SQL PostgreSQL, Secret Manager. Use when setting up GCP infrastructure, writing Terraform for Cloud Run or Cloud SQL, or following TechTown IaC conventions.

plugins.name: project-setup
plugins.description: Initialize a new TechTown project with CLAUDE.md, README, .gitignore, pre-commit hooks, and GitHub Actions CI skeleton. Use when starting a new TechTown repo, setting up project conventions, or initializing a repo.

plugins.name: reporting
plugins.description: Generate TechTown-branded standalone HTML reports with Chart.js visualizations, dark/light mode, and Puppeteer PDF export. Use when creating client deliverables, audit reports, dashboards, or any TechTown-branded HTML report.

plugins.name: astro-firebase-app
plugins.description: Scaffold a TechTown Astro 5 app with Firebase Hosting and Google SSO restricted to @techtown.fr. Use when creating a new internal TechTown web application, nouvelle app Astro TechTown, scaffold application, Astro Firebase setup.

plugins.name: techtown-guardrails
plugins.description: TechTown security guardrails: blocks writing secret files (.env, service-account, credentials) and enforces terraform fmt after editing .tf files. Use when securing a TechTown project against secret leaks.

plugins.name: secret-audit
plugins.description: Scan the local workstation for plaintext secrets across all shells, cloud CLIs, MCP configs, and dev tools. Generates a local redacted HTML report — values are NEVER displayed.
